channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: Bashlite — 2 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with bashlite .

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: Unknown Stealer — 7 new IOCs detected
Inside cyber attacks on Stryker Corp, US medical giant, targeted by Iran
item.description:
A major cyberattack disrupted the systems of US medical technology giant Stryker Corporation after an Iran-linked hacking group claimed responsibility. The incident reportedly wiped thousands of devices and extracted massive data, raising concerns about destructive cyber warfare across the globe
The logo of Stryker medical technology is seen on their plant in the IDA (Industrial Development Agency) estate, in Carrigtwohill, County Cork, Ireland, March 28, 2025. File Image/Reuters
A large-sc...
